target.title: feat(web): add publisher dashboard workspace
target.body:
## Summary

This PR adds an owner-aware publisher workspace for managing skills and plugins from one dashboard.

- What changed: the signed-in dashboard gains publisher switching, actionable review states, catalog controls, download analytics, a changelog surface, and direct publishing/import paths.
- Why: publishers need one operational view for inventory, trust signals, performance, and recent platform changes across personal and organization contexts.

## What changed

### Publisher context and navigation

- Added personal and organization publisher switching with the active identity carried through dashboard queries and publishing links.
- Added publisher-aware skill and plugin detail, settings, validation, and security-audit destinations.
- Added authenticated loading, empty, timeout, and sign-in states for the dashboard.
- Added a unified “Add skill or plugin” route with owner-aware defaults across dashboard and publishing entry points.

### Package inventory

- Rebuilt the package inventory around shared list and grid views for skills and plugins.
- Added type filters, sorting, search disclosure, view switching, pagination, and URL-backed dashboard state.
- Added persistent list/grid and sidebar preferences.
- Added package row menus with view, settings, audit, copy, and publishing actions appropriate to each artifact.
- Added normalized catalog metadata, status labels, owner paths, canonical detail links, and download counts.

### Trust and review workflow

- Added a “Needs attention” surface that groups security, visibility, validation, and quality findings by artifact.
- Added blocked, pending, and review severity states with concise context and hidden/removed visibility labels.
- Added an in-dashboard SkillSpector review sheet with vulnerability patterns and findings.
- Added an in-dashboard plugin validation sheet with CLI guidance, copyable instructions, error/warning groups, and remediation details.
- Routed plugin security reviews to the canonical audit surface and retained validation-specific destinations where appropriate.
- Added manager-scoped plugin inspector findings and the package metadata needed to render real review states.

### Download analytics

- Added publisher-scoped download metrics for skills, plugins, and combined inventory.
- Added 1-day, 1-week, 1-month, and all-time views with daily series, comparison deltas, chart labels, and tooltips.
- Added per-item metric selection for skills and plugins.
- Included complete publisher inventories and legacy personal ownership in aggregate and selected-item metrics.
- Read canonical skill stats and real package daily stats instead of synthetic chart data.

### Changelog and dashboard sidebar

- Added a `/changelog` route with All, Web, CLI, and API filters.
- Added anchored entries, expandable details, contextual action buttons, and changelog artwork.
- Added a collapsible dashboard sidebar with GitHub import and the latest platform updates.
- Added direct links between dashboard updates and their anchored changelog entries.

### Shared UI and coverage

- Extended shared browse controls, header behavior, select rendering, skeletons, route generation, and responsive dashboard styles.
- Added focused coverage for dashboard routing, catalog behavior, attention states, download metrics, and changelog data.
- Updated generated Convex API types for the new dashboard query surface.

## Linked Issue

- Closes N/A
- Related N/A

## Behavioural Proof

Verified the signed-in flow on `http://localhost:3000/dashboard` with local Convex personas for personal and organization publishers. Exercised list/grid inventory, publisher switching, empty states, security and validation drawers, metric ranges and item selection, sidebar persistence, and anchored changelog entries.

- [x] Behavioural proof included

## Security / Trust Impact

This PR adds authenticated publisher-scoped reads and manager-scoped inspector findings to render existing security, visibility, and validation state. It reuses the existing identity, publisher membership, ownership, and audit route boundaries; it does not add moderation or scanner write actions.

- [ ] No security/trust impact
- [x] Security/trust impact explained

## Data / Deploy Impact

No schema migration or backfill is required. The change adds Convex query code and generated API typing, so the backend and web app must be deployed together.

- [ ] No data/deploy impact
- [x] Data/deploy impact explained

## Verification

- [x] `bun run ci:static`
- [x] Focused tests for touched behavior: `bun run test -- src/routes/-dashboard.test.tsx src/components/dashboard/dashboardDownloadMetrics.test.ts src/components/dashboard/dashboardCatalog.test.ts src/components/dashboard/dashboardAttention.test.ts convex/skills.dashboard.test.ts convex/packages.public.test.ts`
- [x] `bun run ci:unit`
- [x] Broader gate: `bun run ci:types-build`
- [x] Other: `git diff --check upstream/main...HEAD`
